creator: mlogsd@atshell.com
text: I updated to 12.2 p4 and still have the same issue; after running sudo -i the sudo command hangs indefinitely, with one minor difference.  Now if I kill the sudo process from another terminal and immediately run sudo again I do get a valid shell without the hang.  I put the pam_yubico module in debug mode and see that it is indeed getting a success and finishing the module.  If I add the pam_unix module after the pam_yubico module the pam_unix module does ask for a password.  After getting past the yubico module and entering the password requested by the pam_unix module it still hangs indefinitely.
